steps.title: Identify the geometric series
steps.content:
The second factor $$1 + p + p^2 + p^3 + p^4 + p^5 + p^6$$ is a finite geometric series with first term $$1$$ and common ratio $$p$$. Its sum for $$p \ne 1$$ is $$\frac{1 - p^7}{1 - p}$$.
Multiplying by the first factor $$(1-p)$$ gives $$(1-p)\cdot\frac{1 - p^7}{1 - p} = 1 - p^7$$.

steps.title: Match the simplified expression to the choices
steps.content:
The simplified result is $$1 - p^7$$, which corresponds exactly to choice B.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
